month.description: Visible month anchor (`YYYY-MM-DD`), defaults to selected date or today.

firstDayOfWeek.description: First weekday index, `0` Sunday to `6` Saturday. Defaults to `0`.

locale.description: Localized month label locale. Defaults to `en-US`.

label.description: Accessible label for the grid. Defaults to `Calendar`.

class.description: Additional classes for the root node.

unsupportedProps.name: disabledDate
unsupportedProps.description: Return true to disable a specific day.

unsupportedProps.name: onchange
unsupportedProps.description: Called when the user commits a day selection.
